global.description: The ad features a warm-toned background with a clear focus on the logo and call to action.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to install the ClearLedger app with confidence.

elements.label: Abstract shapes background
elements.description: A soft, abstract background featuring overlapping geometric shapes in warm tones.

elements.label: ClearLedger logo
elements.description: A bold, modern logo with the text 'ClearLedger' prominently displayed at the top.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping geometric shapes, one circular and one square, in a muted color palette.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold, white text stating 'Save with confidence' positioned centrally on the ad.
elements.text_content: Save with confidence Fast signup; instant card

elements.label: Subheadline text
elements.description: Smaller white text below the headline that reads 'Fast signup, instant card'.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Install now' in white, set against a contrasting background.

embedding_texts.global_text: ClearLedger, unknown, interstitial, warm and modern, key elements include logo, headline, and call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the main headline in the center, subheadline below, and the CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: ClearLedger, Save with confidence, Fast signup, instant card, €29.99, Install now
